title: Amtech B1650 350mm (14") Bolt Cutter
features: COMFORTABLE AND EASY TO USE: This 350mm (14") bolt cutter has spring loaded jaws and heavy duty, comfort grip handles for ease of use
EASY TO ALIGN: An adjusting screw helps keep the cutting edges aligned, ensuring clean cuts
DURABLE: Made from drop forged, heat treated, hardened and tempered steel with high carbon steel blades
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: BACKED BY AMTECH S Backed by Amtech’s 3-year guarantee with UK-based aftercare.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Box Contains Bolt cutter
